card_text: Claude Opus 4.5 demonstrates exceptional performance across multiple benchmarks: 89.2% on SWE-bench Verified, 90.1% on MMLU, 94.7% on HumanEval, 82.4% on GPQA Diamond, and 96.8% on GSM8K. The model achieves 85.3% on MATH and 76.2% on TruthfulQA, showcasing strong reasoning and safety characteristics.
